mapper.select:
SELECT v.maVe, v.gheNgoi, v.maHanhKhach, v.maChuyen, v.ngayMua, v.maXe,
p.maHanhKhach as p_maHanhKhach, p.hoTen as p_hoTen, p.soDienThoai as p_soDienThoai, p.email as p_email,
t.maChuyen as t_maChuyen, t.ngayGioKhoiHanh as t_ngayGioKhoiHanh, t.ngayGioDen as t_ngayGioDen, t.diemDi as t_diemDi, t.diemDen as t_diemDen, t.trangThai as t_trangThai
FROM ve v LEFT JOIN hanhkhach p ON v.maHanhKhach = p.maHanhKhach LEFT JOIN chuyenxe t ON v.maChuyen = t.maChuyen WHERE v.maVe = #{maVe} AND v.maXe = #{maXe} AND v.maTuyen = #{maTuyen} AND v.maChuyen = #{maChuyen}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Ve (gheNgoi, maHanhKhach, maChuyen, ngayMua, maXe, maTuyen) VALUES (#{gheNgoi}, #{maHanhKhach}, #{maChuyen}, now(), #{maXe}, #{maTuyen})
